artPrompt: An ornate hero shot of a single oversized six-sided die carved from ember-veined stone, hovering above an altar of overturned ballot boxes in the feral town square, sparks and embers swirling around its glowing pips as a bonfire roars behind. The die dominates the frame, gilded and ominous, flecks of confetti caught in the firelight. Mono-red palette of flame orange, ember red, and black smoke, talismanic chaos, composed wide in a 4:3 landscape frame, rendered as a vibrant gouache storybook illustration — saturated matte color, simplified flat-ish shapes, soft painterly edges, decorative.
name: Ceremonial Lucky Die
text: {1}, {T}: Roll a six-sided die. If the result is 4 or higher, Ceremonial Lucky Die deals 2 damage to any target. Otherwise, it deals 2 damage to you.
flavorText: Blessed by the mayor, cursed by physics.
